result.summary: Apigee exposes two developer-facing HTTP APIs: Google Cloud Apigee Management API and Apigee Edge APIs; both require auth (Bearer OAuth for Cloud Apigee, Basic or Bearer OAuth for Edge).

gcp_oauth.label: Google Cloud OAuth access token
gcp_oauth.setup: Use your Google account or service account to obtain a Google Cloud access token. For interactive access, sign in via the Google Cloud console and use the resulting OAuth token; for automation, prefer a service account with the appropriate Apigee permissions. See the Google Cloud authentication docs at [Authentication](https://cloud.google.com/docs/authentication). For Apigee Edge API calls in the docs UI, enter `Bearer <your-token>` in the authorize dialog.

apigee_basic.label: Apigee Edge username/password
apigee_basic.setup: Use your Apigee Edge account email address and password. In the API docs' Try this API panel, choose Basic authorization and enter your Apigee Edge username (email address) and password. If your account has MFA enabled, Basic Authentication will not work.
